title: Chinna Chinna Kiliye Lyrics Kannedhirey Thondrinal

chinna chinna kiliye
panjchavarna kiliye

paal chottum natchathiram
paarththaayaa
thaen mottum mullai mottum
paarththaayaa
kalavaadum minnal ondrai
paarththaayaa
kankothuum paravai ondrai
paarththaayaa

kannaal kandaal nee sollu
un kaazhil vizhuven nee sollu
chinna chinna kiliye
panjchavarna kiliye

nilaa nilaa kaadhal nilaa
aval vaazhvathu ulloorilaa
ulaa ulaa vaa vennilaa
kanvaazhvathu kanneerilaa

paadhai konda manne
avalin paadha suvadu
paarththaayaa

thogai konda mayile avalin

oonjchalaadum mugile avalin

odugindra nadhiye avalin

kannaal kandaal nee sollu

chinna chinna kiliye
panjchavarna kiliye

engae engae vinmeen engae

angae ingae kaanom endru
adivaanile naan aerinen

koodu thaedum kiliye
avail veedu engae
paarthaayaa

ullaadum kaattre
avalin ullam sendru
paarthaayaa

thooral podum thuliye
uyirai thottu ponaval
paarthaayaa

panju pondra nenjai
theeyil vittu ponaval
paarthaayaa

kannaal kandaal nee sollu
un kaazhil vizhuven nee sollu
chinna chinna kiliye
panjchavarna kiliye

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses the beauty of love and the emotions associated with it, using vivid imagery and metaphors.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is featured in the movie Kannedhirey Thondrinal.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the talented Hariharan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by the renowned A.R. Rahman.

When was this song released?

This song was released in 1998.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Chinna Chinna Kiliye, the listener is taken on a melodic journey that beautifully encapsulates the feelings of love and affection. The song's soothing rhythm and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. It conveys the emotions of longing and joy, resonating deeply with anyone who has experienced love. This timeless classic remains a favorite for weddings and anniversaries, celebrating the essence of togetherness.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Chinna Chinna Kiliye from Kannedhirey Thondrinal is a timeless melody that captures the essence of romance and nostalgia. With Hariharan's soulful voice and A.R. Rahman's enchanting composition, this song transports listeners to a world of love and longing. Experience the magic of this classic as it beautifully intertwines heartfelt lyrics with a soothing rhythm.
stanzaMeanings: Little little bird, colorful bird, have you seen the star that shines? The honey and jasmine bloom, have you seen the lightning that strikes? Have you seen the bird that flies? If you see with your eyes, tell me, I will fall into your eyes. Little little bird, colorful bird, the moon, the moon of love, she lives in the heart.
